name: Sentry Native SDK
description: Sentry SDK for C, C++, and native applications with minidump crash handling via Crashpad and Breakpad.

seo.title: Sentry Native SDK — Crash Reporting
seo.meta_description: Sentry Native SDK: Sentry SDK for C, C++, and native applications with minidump crash handling via Crashpad and Breakpad.

when_to_use: C++ crash reporting with minidump handling via Crashpad
Native crash symbolication for game engine and SDK developers
ANR and hang detection for C/C++ mobile and desktop apps

pros: First-class Sentry SDK for C/C++ and native apps
Minidump handling via Crashpad and Breakpad
Rich Sentry dashboard, alerts and releases
Active maintenance and broad platform support
cons: Tied to Sentry pricing and ecosystem
Native integration more complex than web/mobile SDKs
Symbol upload workflow can be tedious
Some advanced features gated behind higher tiers
review.verdict: Default pick for native crash reporting if youre already in the Sentry world; otherwise evaluate Backtrace.
review.best_for: Native/C++ teams already using Sentry for their other stacks
review.not_for: Teams committed to a different error-tracking vendor

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
